column1: Hey Adam, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book?
Yea I'll be in Punta Cana too it's a good vibe
How many of yall in the group?
Loved “Yea I'll be in Punta Cana too it's a good vibe”
I know I hate the green texts too it's just what we use for work
lol gotcha I didn't wanna say some weird shit
We're from Hofstra University on Long Island
Lol nah you're good honestly caught me at a good time up watching the packers game and saw it come through
thats dope tho Hofstra is lit I heard
I'll send the details over now, how soon were you lookin to book?
How soon were you lookin to get things planned out for the group
As soon as we can honestly
We wanna have everything planned and booked by Christmas time
all good bro. word, ill add in the payment plan which allows you to reserve now and then have things fully paid for around then
cool if I send the info through email? its a little long for text
word whats the best email to send to?
Do you have an estimate of how much it might be per person
yea itll be all in the email, we can chat it through. flights tho, you'll save money getting separately on your own. which airport you gonna be looking to fly out of?
Loved “yea itll be all in the email, we can chat it through. flights tho, you'll save money getting separately on your own. which airport you gonna be looking to fly out of?”
Flying out of jfk most likely
aight bet, ill send the email without flight and then ill help you find a good cheap flight out of JFK you can grab separately
just sent the base package over through email. I can hook it up with a discount on the prices you see there too just lmk which one we want to narrow down on
ill personally be at the occidental punta cana, thats my recommendation for sure. its the nicest out of the options and its where we host our pool parties and events
Loved “ill personally be at the occidental punta cana, thats my recommendation for sure. its the nicest out of the options and its where we host our pool parties and events”
I haven't gotten the email yet can you resend it?
yea will resend! also check your spam or promotions folder just in case. sometimes it gets filtered there since theres pricing in it
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
my bad bro those werent meant for you!
Hey I looked at that hotel it looks really good and the prices aren't crazy either
What were you saying about a discount
Also I was wondering if the occidental punta cana has a lot of college people there or are there a lot of older or younger people
Yea bro super affordable. And yea be actually do have a few Bama groups I just gotta check if they're break is the same as yours

Their* sheesh lol. But yea I can hook it up on the Occidental Punta Cana package since that's where I'll be your week. That's where most of our college students are. We host all of our events there and bring DJs
Im able to finesse $749 on that 5 night and $599 on the 4 night if we're game to deposit this week
Me and my friend did our research we know all the colleges with the same spring break as us dw
I think this sounds really good I don't think we can deposit this week but we'll start confirming it with people
Sup bro, okay bet. When do you think works for the group for deposits? Just so I can try to set a res aside for you
yoo Adam whats good bro. how things lookin for spring brek?
I was about to text you
We have a chapter meeting an about 15 minutes in gonna bring up the place and I think we'll confirm it
I just won't really have numbers confirmed yet
Could I set a res aside before having exact numbers
oh bet. yea its all good. we can start with whoever's 100% in and then we can add as we go
Is there a chance it would fill up?
things have been busy, everyones been booking. so what happens first is prices go up, and then it sells out
once we start a reservation, and its active with deposits, its easier to finesse from there and add/subtract as needed
Would it be better to overestimate and then if people say they can't go anymore then we lower the numbers
Would the prices go up if the reservation is made now
Liked “once we start a reservation, and its active with deposits, its easier to finesse from there and add/subtract as needed”
yea so without deposits prices are still subject to change. once a person deposits it locks in the price for their specific slot
but once a res is active and theres a couple deposits, its easier for me to finesse and try to keep things the same for the rest of the group within reasonable time. as ppl hop in
do you want me to set something up now with a handful of slots? in case the boys are ready tonight after the convo
reasonable time is however long ops team lets me hold the price and discount without getting in trouble lol
not really a set time, but one they tell me I can't hold it they go in and tweak things to the updated pricing
So if I tell people have deposits in asap and then the latest be thanksgiving that would be alright?
Sorry just tryna figure out why to tell people they need an ultimatum usually or nothing will get done with them
And what does the paying timeline look like after deposits
yea I wanna say that will be alright, but I don't wanna guarantee it in case things are sold out come thanksgiving and guys cant deposit anymore
I feel you on the ultimatum. ppl like to drag their feet lol
I would let them know you got a deal from your boy for $50 off and a free booze cruise for those that deposit this week. booze cruise event is worth $75 for context
yo btw did we want to do 5 nights, or 4? my 5 night discount is $729, and 4 is $599
That all sounds great I'll let em know
We wanna do 5 nights but I think guys wanted 2 per room instead of 4
Loved “I feel you on the ultimatum. ppl like to drag their feet lol”
aight bet. yea thats a good way to do it so everyone gets their own bed. lemme see what I can do for pricing
it'd be $829 for the 2 per room. seeing if I can stretch a $799 for you but may be a force
if I get it we'd need the boys to move rather quickly to get in on that price
I'm gonna talk about it soon and I'll let you know what people think
I just talked about it I have at least 16 people interested in going I have them all the info
thats gonna be a solid group and only more ppl gonna want to join in
So what are the next steps

Yea so now that you have people on board I set up a reservation for you with the 16 slots. 8 rooms of 2. You'll hop on the reservation yourself, and send the link out for the group to start slotting in
each person hits join trip, itll prompt them through creating an account, and they enter their own deposit onto their own slot
When could you get that to me
It might end up being more than 16 I talked to a few more people who weren't at the meeting
I'll make that for you rn
And word, we can start with 16 and as they fill up we can open up more long as there's availability
do guys seem ready to deposit?
We definitely have a good amount of guys who can deposit this week
sup broo. ko'd last night, sending it all now so you can share with the boys

sent this through email but here it is too. this is the reservation link you'll send out to everyone. the email has a step by step breakdown on how to get on https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/ZY2SXLVVCP
I got the email thank you
Is there any way I can have a week for people to deposit and still get that deal
yooo whats good bro. lemme see if I can lock in that deal for you. we thinkin deposit by sunday the 8th?
yo! got things adjust for sunday the 8th. ops team is on my back about it tho so we just gotta make sure ppl tap in by then
will everyone be able to get in before then?
But I can get a good amount
There's always gonna be some kids that are gonna take a bit longer unfortunately
I'll see what I can do though
aight, just want y'all to be able to take advantage of the deal with the discount and booze cruise
Yeah for sure I get that
So anyone who doesn't have it by Sunday won't have that discount or the cruise?
I wanna let people know what they'll be missing out on
yea bro, ppl that hop in after sunday will have the regular price at $899, and the booze cruise wont be included but will be an add on they can add to their accounts. its a $75
so essentially theyre getting $145 of a deal by depositing before Sunday
they could save that and put it towards the flight
I just looked over the dates again and realized that we would need to change them a little, would that be alright?
yea thats straight we can do either or. price will be the same
I'm asking everyone right now I'll let you know in a bit
Liked “yea thats straight we can do either or. price will be the same”
Can we rearrange roommates after people make their reservations
We'll figure it all out once people join
Hey I got an email saying we have to pay by tonight at midnight for that deal I told everyone they'd have by 11:59 pm tomorrow
All good bro that's an error you're good for tomorrow. Will have the ops team adjust that
Hey can you add two extra rooms we're full and we have a few extra guys who still wanna sign up
If people don't get that second payment in by the 15th do they not get the deal anymore?
And if so is there any way to extend that second payment by a tiny bit?
I know a lot of dudes get payed every two weeks so ai think it would be best for people if they could have two weeks from the first payment
i can do my best but i cant guarantee i'll be able to hold the deal past the 15th
you think moving the second payment out a bit would get people on board for the 15th?
I'm not sure what you mean
lol my bad, was trying to say if the deposit is the 15, but the next payment was a few weeks out so the boys got some time would that work for everyone?
The deposit is the initial $200 right? I think almost everyone paid that already
I'm asking for the second payment of that could be pushed back
ohhhhhhhh i gotcha lol my bad bro, lemme see what i can do i'll reach out to operations rn
Okay cool just let me know what you find out
How much time did you need? And is it just you or was it a couple ppl
Best option would probably be before thanksgiving but that asking a lot probably
Lemme check in on that will let you know first thing in the am, we should be aight
Hey bro I was able to get it extended a week to the 22nd
I know a while ago you mentioned helping us find flights can you still do that?
for sure bro, where you flying out of?
word bro i'll check both out see wtw is
yoo here's one i found leaving from JFK for $413, really good price for your week tbh https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/HMhQcn31tSEYFhWs9
yoo whats good fam. heads up, do Emerson, Eli, Nick B, and Chris B plan on going on the trip? their slots are about to be deleted by operations team for inactivity
Eli is still going, Chris is figuring it out, and the other two I'm not sure about the other two
yoyo! word if Eli is in need him to put his deposit down so that he doesn't lose his spot
and they honestly dont have any time at this point. kinda gotta make their decision so we don't hold the group back
Adam bro any word from the boys
Hey I was just about to text you
Eli paid, Emerson paid, I don't think Chris is going, and I don't know if Nick B paid
We have one other guy that might sign up still that isn't signed up at all but he knows that the slots might be taken away at any time
Nahh Nick B slackin lowkey. he hasn't
Yea brooo os team is pressin me about it
I'm gonna text Nick and the other guy and say if they don't pay by tonight then they're just not going
What's the deal with Nicolas M his is saying overdue but he says he paid
Aight bet yea just lmk. and Nicolas M made his first payment for the deposit but never made his 2nd payment
If we end up having an odd amount of people could we make one of the rooms a 3 person room
yea thats what we'll have to do. its a little more expensive tho for the 3 person room
I thought a 3 person room was cheaper than a 2 person room
And that 1 person room was most expensive and 4 person was least expensive
yea Im backwards bro my b. idk why I was thinkin you had 4 person rooms
doing a million things at once
So would the final deposit just be cheaper for those three people?
Liked “doing a million things at once”
One guy Angus paid the second deposit like 20 minutes late will he still be able to get the deal and the cruise?

Also I'm talking to Nico now and (even though I told them many times) he misunderstood and thought he was locked in for the discount and cruise, he wanted me to ask you if because he paid the first deposit on time and if he gets the second payment by midnight if he can still have that deal
I told him not likely but that I'd ask you
Tell Nico if he gets it in by tn he's good for the cruise
Emerson and Eli I was able to kee the same price for them but they wont have the cruise on their package. they joined hella late
Okay perfect I let everyone know
Yeah probably but you won't be able to sit with me for the first one
You don't think you could get here on time?
Shit sorry those last two texts were not for you
Is there anything else we need to get done for now?
just add fight info onto your accounts whenever you have it. and keep up with the plan. should be all good!
So are Nick B and Chris out?
yerr whats good bro, is Eli still lookin for someone to hop in his room?
Also would Anthony and Haiden wanna room together since their roommates dropped out?
I'm not sure about Eli looking for someone I think we might do one room of 3
And we're gonna all rearrange the rooms so I'll send you a list of that when I get it
Oh damn bro if we're re arranging I needa know like today
Like in the next couple hours lowkey. lmk
Okay I'll let you know soon
Adam S Kevin H Cam N Ryan R John D Scott P Eli V Angus F Emerson M Frank P Anthony A Haiden H Jake C Nico M Thomas M Sam C Owen S

Hey I have a few questions for you. What time is check-in and checkout? Also, a lot of people are taking different flights because we couldn't get them all together, is it okay for people to check in and check out at different times?

Also I know there are some nicer restaurant options, do we have to make reservations for them? If so, how do we make them and how early? And if we wanna do some extra excursions how do we book those as well?
Oh also with the people getting there and leaving at different times, will there be issues with getting shuttles from the airport?

Hey man check in is 3 and check out is 11. but when you arrive, if there are rooms available youll be able to check in whenever. if there arent rooms available youre stll able to chill and use the resort - drink, pool, etc until rooms are ready
Reservations for the restaurants you make on site, they usually dont allow ppl to call ahead
Flights, thats fine, everyones arrival time is treated individually. you can all have diff flights
those you add on at the resort. we can help you get the booze cruise locked in. but things like ATV riding, tours, etc, you set up at the concierge desk at the resort
our onsite staff can show you where to go
Hey! Now that everyone has their payments in, is there anything else we have to do before spring break?
yoyo! yea next everyone will want to add their flight info onto their accounts so we can start to schedule their transportation from the airport and back

Hey! I'm getting people to put their flight info in. I have a few questions for you. First, for the booze cruise, should it be showing up somewhere on our account? And are there any release forms that we need to sign? I was also looking at the add ons offered on the website. It's showing imagine, coco bongo, and maroca. I was wondering if you know anything about the and have any recommendation.

Sup bro! the Booze cruise in your accounts. labeled 'discounted booze cruise'. there are 15 of you that have it. No release forms to sign, you signed our customer agreement during the payment process. I would recommend Imagine and Coco Bongo for sure. Maroca is cool if you want a 3rd night out
Hey so I have two guys who potentially wanna join us on spring break he wanted me to ask you if there are any extra two person rooms that we could potentially add to the reservation
Yea we can run it bro, they just gotta be ready to pay in full by this afternoon
yoyo, were they still looking to book?
also whenever you have a min, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers
yoo! Are Kevin, Ryan, Haiden and Emerson on the same flights as anyone? still need they info
and also were y'all looking to add any party passes to your packages
Emerson unfortunately is not going anymore he's just gonna eat the cost, Ryan is on mine, Haiden and Kevin I'm not sure I'll find out for you

Also people are freaking about about internet is wifi included at the resort?
Wifi included, it isn't bad at all
Imagine Cave over coco bongo in my opinion

Right now it's looking like imagine I'm taking a poll

bettt lmk when you got it

did everyone wanna add Imagine? I can get that in for you now
